title: phaseolus vulgaris var. luteus
intro: Phaseolus vulgaris var. luteus, also known as yellow kidney bean, is a variety of the common bean plant, characterized by its yellow color and kidney-shaped seeds. The medicinal properties of Phaseolus vulgaris var. luteus include its potential to reduce blood sugar levels and alleviate symptoms of diabetes due to its high fiber and protein content. The health benefits of consuming this plant include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve digestion, and provide essential nutrients such as iron, potassium, and zinc. In herbal preparations, Phaseolus vulgaris var. luteus is often used to make teas, soups, and stews, as well as being used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
